_README: Triage Prompt QA Test Cases — Talent Inbox Automation
_purpose: Use these test cases to validate that the triage prompt in prompts/triage.md produces correct scores before and after any prompt changes. Run manually by pasting the USER PROMPT into the OpenAI Playground with the SYSTEM PROMPT from prompts/triage.md at temperature 0.1.
_how_to_run: 2. Set model to gpt-4o-mini, temperature to 0.1, max tokens to 200.
3. Paste the SYSTEM PROMPT from prompts/triage.md into the System field.
4. For each test case below, paste the user_prompt into the User field and run.
5. Compare the 'score' field in the JSON response to expected_score.
6. If any test fails, adjust the triage prompt and re-run the full suite.
7. Document failures in the Notes column of the master log for tracking.
_pass_threshold: 18 of 20 tests must pass before deploying a prompt change to production.

test_cases.label: Obvious spam — prize win
test_cases.user_prompt:
Talent name: Sylvia
Talent minimum rate (USD): 1000

Email subject: Congratulations! You've won a $500 Amazon gift card
Email sender: noreply@promo-rewards-center.net
Email sender domain: promo-rewards-center.net
Email body:
---
Dear influencer,

You have been selected as our lucky winner! Click the link below to claim your $500 Amazon gift card. This offer expires in 24 hours.

Claim now: http://claimgift.promo-rewards-center.net/claim
---

Score this email. Return only the JSON object.
test_cases.notes: Classic spam. No brand. Prize win. Should be hard Score 1.

test_cases.label: Non-English email
test_cases.user_prompt:
Talent name: Trin
Talent minimum rate (USD): 2000

Email subject: Collaboration invitation
Email sender: info@beautybrands.cn
Email sender domain: beautybrands.cn
Email body:
---
亲爱的Trinity，

我们是一家知名化妆品品牌，希望与您合作。我们的预算为1000美元。请回复确认合作意向。

谢谢
Beauty Brands China
---

Score this email. Return only the JSON object.
test_cases.notes: Non-English body. Should be Score 1 regardless of whether it looks like a real brand.

test_cases.label: No company name, personal email domain
test_cases.user_prompt:
Talent name: Sam
Talent minimum rate (USD): 700

Email subject: Hi! Want to collab?
Email sender: sarah.marketing123@gmail.com
Email sender domain: gmail.com
Email body:
---
Hey! I saw your TikTok and I think you'd be great for our product. We're a small startup and can pay $50. Let me know!

Sarah
---

Score this email. Return only the JSON object.
test_cases.notes: Personal Gmail domain. No company name. Very low offer. Hard Score 1.

test_cases.label: Unsubscribe confirmation
test_cases.user_prompt:
Talent name: Britt
Talent minimum rate (USD): 900

Email subject: You've been successfully unsubscribed

Email body:
---
You have been successfully removed from our mailing list. You will no longer receive emails from us. If this was a mistake, click here to resubscribe.
---

Score this email. Return only the JSON object.
test_cases.notes: System/transactional email. Not a business opportunity. Hard Score 1.

test_cases.label: Grammar/spelling quality indicates bot or scam
test_cases.user_prompt:
Talent name: Allee
Talent minimum rate (USD): 650

Email subject: URGENT collab offer for you!!!
Email sender: info@fashionpartners-intl.biz
Email sender domain: fashionpartners-intl.biz
Email body:
---
Hello dear influencer!!! We are the big fashion company need you for promotion!! Pay you $1000!!! Very urgent deal pleas respond ASAP!!! Send personal information to confirm deal today!!!

Fashion Partners International
---

Score this email. Return only the JSON object.
test_cases.notes: Clear bot/scam grammar despite mentioning $1,000. Score 1.

I am currently out of the office until Monday, April 21. I will respond to your email upon my return. For urgent matters, please contact my colleague at assistant@brandco.com.

Thank you.

Score this email. Return only the JSON object.
test_cases.notes: Out-of-office auto-reply. Not a new inquiry. Score 1.

test_cases.label: Score 2 — real company, no rate, missing details
test_cases.user_prompt:
Talent name: Lizz
Talent minimum rate (USD): 600

Email subject: Collaboration Opportunity
Email sender: partnerships@revolve.com
Email sender domain: revolve.com
Email body:
---
Hi,

We're reaching out from Revolve's influencer partnerships team. We think Lizz would be a great fit for an upcoming campaign. Could you share her rates and availability?

Best,
Revolve Partnerships Team
---

Score this email. Return only the JSON object.
test_cases.notes: Revolve is a recognizable mid-tier brand. No rate mentioned, but brand-name override rule applies. Acceptable if system returns 3. Would also accept 2 (rate/details missing) — primary intent is to ensure it does NOT score 1.

Score this email. Return only the JSON object.

test_cases.label: KatrinaD — hourly livestream offer above minimum

Talent minimum rate (USD): 150

Email subject: TikTok Livestream Partnership — $600 for 2 hours
Email sender: partnerships@liveshop-brands.com
Email sender domain: liveshop-brands.com
Email body:

Hi Katrina's team,

We're LiveShop Brands, a TikTok Shop partner agency. We'd love to book Katrina for a 2-hour TikTok Live shopping event. We can offer $600 total for the 2-hour session. She would feature our skincare products live. Please let us know her availability!

Best,
LiveShop Brands
---

Score this email. Return only the JSON object.
test_cases.notes: $600 for 2 hours = $300/hr which is above the minimum $150/hr. Clear Score 3. Offer type may vary — Sponsored Post or Other are acceptable.
